name: The Wisdom Path
subtitle: How do I make good choices?
description: A journey through Proverbs — learning that wisdom comes from knowing God and living His way.
mainTruth: Wisdom begins with knowing and trusting God.
outcomes: Understands wisdom as a way of life, not just knowledge
Can identify one wise choice they made this week
Understands that fear of God means loving and respecting Him
completionMessage: You walked the wisdom path. Keep walking it — it gets better every day.
parentNote: Proverbs is one of the most practical books for discipling children in everyday decision-making. This journey connects their daily choices to the fear of God.
